content.en:
"White-bearded old man!"

Many Legendary Realm Lords nodded one after another.

The reputation of this peak Legendary Realm Lord is indeed very good, even better than that of the Ice River Lord, but it is a little difficult to meet the white-bearded old man.

They want to visit the white beards, but it will be very difficult.

However, Ye Tian had seen the white-bearded old man, and if he went to see the white-bearded old man, there was still hope.

So, they agreed to Ye Tian's suggestion

this day.

Ye Tian came to Xuyang Mountain again, this is the caretaker lord of Xuyang Mountain, the Lord of Shaoshan appeared.

"Endless Lord, have you broken through to become a Legendary Realm Lord?"

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain was surprised.

"Break through by luck!" Ye Tian said modestly.

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain said: "If you break through, you will break through, how can there be any luck, your cultivation speed is really fast, since you have broken through to the realm of the Legendary Realm Lord, how about we have a discussion?"

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain is very warlike, but he rarely has the opportunity to fight against each other while guarding the mountain here.

Now, Ye Tian is here, and he naturally wants to fight with Ye Tian.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Rushing!!

The two of them entered the long river of time, after all, if they fought with all their strength in Xuyang Mountain, the Legendary Realm Lord was too destructive, even if Xuyang Mountain was guarded by a powerful formation, the Lord of Shaking Mountain did not want to disturb the old man with white beard.

Therefore, there is no problem in fighting in the long river of time.

Bang!!!!!

The long river of time surged, and the aura of the Lord of the Shaking Mountain exploded, far surpassing the ordinary Legendary Realm Lord.

After all, he has followed the white-bearded old man for endless years, and a casual point of guidance is an opportunity that others can't imagine, so the Lord of the Shaking Mountain is very powerful, not comparable to the Lord of the Legendary Realm.

Even the Lord of Blackwater is not as good as the Lord of the Shaking Mountain.

It's just that the Lord of the Shaking Mountain is too low-key and doesn't go out, so no one knows how powerful he is.

"Shake the mountain and strike a blow"

The fist of the Lord of the Shaking Mountain directly penetrated the long river of time and killed Ye Tian, if it was an ordinary Legendary Realm Lord, if he took this move hard, I am afraid that it would be severely damaged.

However, the Lord of the Shaking Mountain was not afraid that Ye Tian would be injured, if Ye Tian couldn't even block him with a punch, then it was not worth the attention of the white-bearded old man.

Ye Tian did not choose to dodge, but directly held the Zixu Sword and cast the Void River Sword Light.

Airplanes!!!!

The mountain-shaking blow collided with the sword light of the Void River, shaking the river for a long time.

I saw that the sword light of the Void River of Heaven shattered the blow of Shaking 1 and bombarded the body of the Lord of the Shaking Mountain.

However, the defense of the Lord of the Shaking Mountain was very strong, and he created an extremely powerful defensive supreme technique, so he resisted Ye Tian's Void River Sword Light and was not injured.

Next, Ye Tian went all out, and Lei Dao escaped to make his speed reach an incomparably terrifying level.

Bang bang bang!!!

Ye Tian almost suppressed the Shaking Mountain Lord, but it was still a little difficult to hit the Shaking Mountain Lord.

After a long time, the two stopped talking.

"Endless Lord, you are too powerful, it hasn't been long since you broke through the Legendary Realm Lord, in addition to controlling time, you have also controlled the Sword Dao and the Thunder Dao, I only control the time and the Earth Dao, I can't compare to you!"

The two chatted for a while, and then returned to Xuyang Mountain from the long river of time.

"Go, the master wants to see you. "

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain said suddenly.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian went up to Xuyang Mountain and soon saw the white-bearded old man.

"I've seen the white-bearded old man!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

The white-bearded old man was still dressed like that, and when he saw Ye Tian, he let Ye Tian sit.

After Ye Tian sat down, he didn't immediately explain his intentions, but played a game of chess with the white-bearded old man.

Chess at the level of the lord of the legendary realm is not an ordinary game of chess, but actually a kind of contest.

Ye Tian's control of the Dao is naturally far inferior to that of the white-bearded old man, but he can barely force it for a while, but then he will be defeated.

"Yes, among the lords of the Legendary Realm, it is rare to be able to descend to your level. The white-bearded old man praised.

"Tell me, what's the matter with me this time?"

The white-bearded old man asked.

Ye Tian said truthfully: "Has the white-bearded old man heard of the three thousand kites?"

"Three thousand kites?" the white-bearded old man said slightly, "I've heard of it, what's wrong?"

Ye Tian said: "We really have obtained three thousand iris in the Holy Land, and we will definitely use the three thousand iris to cross the timeline. "

The white-bearded old man understood completely, and smiled slightly: "I'm one of them, am I?"

"Yes. "

Ye Tian nodded.

The white-bearded old man asked again, "Who is the other Peak Legendary Realm Lord?"

"'Lord of the Ice River. Ye Tiandao.

"Binghe, it's him!"

The white-bearded old man muttered.

Ye Tian sat there and did not continue to speak, but waited for the decision of the white-bearded old man.

"I'm not interested in crossing the timeline, and I know your worries, so let's let the Lord of the Shaking Mountain go at all, just take it as a representative of me, and you don't need to worry. The white-bearded old man said.

"Thank you, Old Man Whitebeard!"

Ye Tian thanked.

If there is a Mountain Shaking Lord, even if the Ice River Lord is interested in the three thousand kites, he will not take action against them.

The White-bearded Old Man is a Peak Legendary Realm that has befriended several Eternal Masters, and he is not comparable to ordinary Peak Legendary Realm Lords, and the Ice River Lord will definitely not offend the White-bearded Old Man.

Subsequently, the white-bearded old man called the Lord of the Shaking Mountain.

"Master!"

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain is here.

"Your doppelganger went on a trip with the Endless Lord to cross the timeline with the Endless Lord, which was also a coincidence. The white-bearded old man said.

"Crossing the timeline?"

The Lord of the Shaking Mountains was amazed.

The Peak Legendary Realm Lord can only spy on the past and the future, but he can't cross the timeline himself, but he knows that his master is crossing the timeline, and even the master's other clone is still in the future, and he was taken away by an eternal master

However, once the timeline is crossed, the owner is unable to contact the future clone, and no one knows what will happen.

However, as long as the timeline is not long crossed, when that time comes, the clone will naturally appear.

When the time comes, you will know what benefits you will encounter.

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain also wanted to cross the timeline, but he didn't have a chance, but this time he had a chance.

Soon.

Ye Tian left Xuyang 1L with the Lord of the Shaking Mountain and returned to the Infinite Sea. _
